overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city waterfront at dusk. The camera moves along a neon-lit promenade, passing under overpasses with vending machines, approaching a monumental arch building, then turning to descend waterfront steps toward an industrial district across the canal. Game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring reflective glass skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and atmospheric blue-hour lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront overlook transitioning to covered promenade entrance

events.description: crossing the multi-lane street to reach the opposite sidewalk
entering the covered walkway beneath the elevated highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront railing then crossing the street to enter the covered promenade area

notable_agents.action: person in bright orange pants walking ahead on the sidewalk toward the covered area

entered.detail: tall curved glass towers with reflective surfaces and neon accents
calm water reflecting the city lights and sunset sky
raised concrete roadway structure crossing over the water
rounded building covered in large digital billboards and advertisements
orange-topped safety barrier along the water edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of futuristic glass skyscrapers across a calm waterfront canal at dusk. The camera moves forward along the promenade, crosses a street with sparse traffic, and approaches the entrance to a covered walkway beneath an elevated highway, passing a pedestrian in orange pants.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian arcade with vending machines and newsstand

events.description: passing the large cylindrical advertisement tower covered in digital screens

agents.ego_description: walking under the concrete overpass past neon-lit vending machines and a small newsstand kiosk

entered.detail: green automated vending machine with bright red neon 'BURRITO' signage
small orange and green kiosk structure with magazine and newspaper displays
simple metal bench positioned under the overpass shade
underside of the elevated highway creating a covered tunnel effect

segments.scene_description: Walking through the covered arcade beneath the highway overpass, the scene is illuminated by artificial neon lights. The camera passes a prominent green vending machine with red 'BURRITO' signage and a small orange newsstand kiosk, while the cylindrical ad tower looms large on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade approaching monumental corporate plaza

events.description: exiting the covered overpass into the open plaza with full sky visibility
approaching the massive arch-shaped building at the end of the promenade

agents.ego_description: walking along the open palm-lined promenade toward the monumental arch building with increasing crowd density

notable_agents.action: woman in red pants walking ahead toward the arch building entrance

entered.detail: massive dark brutalist building with a large rectangular archway opening at its center
tall palm trees lining both sides of the walkway
large vertical holographic advertisement screen displaying product promotions

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into an expansive open plaza, the camera approaches a massive arch-shaped corporate building that dominates the skyline. Palm trees line the promenade where pedestrians walk toward the structure, and digital billboards glow on the left side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront amphitheater steps with industrial district views

events.description: turning sharply left to face the waterfront and industrial district across the canal
descending the wide concrete steps toward the lower waterfront level

agents.ego_description: turning to face the water, descending the wide tiered steps, and walking along the lower waterfront promenade

notable_agents.action: couple standing at the railing looking out at the industrial district across the water

entered.detail: tall industrial chimneys and factory buildings with steam vents across the canal
wide tiered amphitheater-style stairs descending to the water level
tall vertical cylindrical light posts along the water edge
distinctive cylindrical industrial tower with circular platforms and warning stripes

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left to reveal the industrial district across the canal, descending wide concrete amphitheater steps toward the water. People sit on the tiered seating while others stand at the railing, with factory smokestacks and a distinctive circular platform tower visible across the water under a bright dusk sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a serene waterfront promenade through a neon-lit underpass and into a sprawling corporate plaza. It begins by gliding past glass skyscrapers across a calm canal and crossing a quiet street before entering a covered walkway beneath an elevated highway. As the camera moves through this artificial arcade, the lighting shifts to vibrant neon, passing a green burrito vending machine and a small newsstand beneath a looming cylindrical ad tower. The scene then opens into an expansive plaza where the camera approaches a massive arch-shaped corporate building lined with palm trees and glowing digital billboards. Finally, the view turns left to descend wide concrete amphitheater steps toward the water, revealing an industrial district with factory smokestacks and a circular platform tower across the canal under a bright dusk sky.
